title: Issue #2 - AI模型性能投票分析
text:
数据解析

# 定义常见模型名称映射
model_mapping <- c(
  "gpt-5" = "GPT-5",
  "gpt-4o" = "GPT-4o",
  "gpt-4" = "GPT-4",
  "gpt-3.5" = "GPT-3.5",
  "claude-opus" = "Claude Opus",
  "claude-sonnet" = "Claude Sonnet",
  "claude-haiku" = "Claude Haiku",
  "claude-3" = "Claude 3",
  "gemini" = "Gemini",
  "deepseek" = "DeepSeek",
  "kimi" = "Kimi",
  "qwen" = "Qwen",
  "glm" = "GLM",
  "minimax" = "MiniMax",
  "grok" = "Grok"
)

# 提取模型排名
extract_models <- function(body) {
  lines <- str_split(body, "\n")[[1]]
  lines <- lines[str_detect(lines, "^\\d+[.．、]")]
  
  models <- c()
  for (i in seq_along(lines)) {
    line <- lines[i]
    # 提取模型名称
    for (model in names(model_mapping)) {
      if (str_detect(tolower(line), tolower(model))) {
        models <- c(models, model_mapping[model])
        break
      }
    }
  }
  models
}

# 解析所有投票
vote_data <- lapply(all_comments, function(x) {
  models <- extract_models(x$body)
  if (length(models) > 0) {
    data.frame(
      rank = 1:length(models),
      model = models,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
}) %>% bind_rows()

cat("解析到", nrow(vote_data), "条模型排名记录\n")

解析到 1185 条模型排名记录

title: Issue #2 - AI模型性能投票分析
text:
统计分析

1. 模型排名频次

# 计算每个模型在各排名的频次
rank_frequency <- vote_data %>%
  group_by(model, rank) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop")

# 计算总票数
total_votes <- vote_data %>%
  count(model, sort = TRUE)

print(head(total_votes, 15))

           model   n
1         Gemini 238
2       DeepSeek 226
3           Kimi 205
4  Claude Sonnet 149
5          GPT-5 143
6         GPT-4o 119
7           Qwen  40
8       Claude 3  18
9    Claude Opus  17
10          Grok  13
11           GLM   8
12         GPT-4   8
13  Claude Haiku   1




2. 平均排名

# 计算平均排名
avg_rank <- vote_data %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_position = mean(rank),
    total_votes = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(avg_position)

print(avg_rank)

title: Issue #2 - AI模型性能投票分析
text:
数据可视化

1. 模型总投票数

ggplot(head(total_votes, 15), aes(x = reorder(model, n), y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "AI模型投票总次数 (Top 15)", x = "模型", y = "投票次数") +
  theme_minimal()










2. 排名热力图

# 排名分布热力图
rank_matrix <- vote_data %>%
  filter(rank <= 5) %>%
  count(model, rank) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = rank, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

# 选择前10个模型
top_models <- head(total_votes$model, 10)
rank_matrix_filtered <- rank_matrix %>% filter(model %in% top_models)

# 转换为长格式并绘图
rank_long <- rank_matrix_filtered %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -model, names_to = "rank", values_to = "count") %>%
  mutate(rank = as.integer(rank))

# 计算每个模型的平均排名用于排序
model_avg_rank <- vote_data %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  summarise(avg_position = mean(rank), .groups = "drop")

rank_long <- rank_long %>%
  left_join(model_avg_rank, by = "model")

ggplot(rank_long, aes(x = rank, y = reorder(model, avg_position), fill = count)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "coral") +
  labs(title = "模型排名分布热力图 (Top 10)", x = "排名", y = "模型") +
  theme_minimal()










3. 平均排名柱状图

ggplot(head(avg_rank, 15), aes(x = reorder(model, avg_position), y = avg_position)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "coral") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "AI模型平均排名 (越低越好)", x = "模型", y = "平均排名") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_reverse()










4. 箱线图

# 排名分布箱线图
ggplot(vote_data %>% filter(model %in% top_models), 
       aes(x = reorder(model, rank), y = rank)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "模型排名分布 (Top 10)", x = "模型", y = "排名") +
  theme_minimal()

title: Issue #2 - AI模型性能投票分析
text:
保存为CSV

# 导出投票数据 - 简化版
num_voters <- length(all_comments)
vote_matrix <- matrix(NA, nrow = num_voters, ncol = 5)
colnames(vote_matrix) <- paste0("第", 1:5, "名")

for (i in 1:5) {
  rank_i_data <- vote_data %>% filter(rank == i)
  vote_matrix[1:nrow(rank_i_data), i] <- rank_i_data$model
}

vote_export <- as.data.frame(vote_matrix, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

write.csv(vote_export, "issue2_voting.csv", row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
cat("投票数据已保存到: issue2_voting.csv\n")

投票数据已保存到: issue2_voting.csv

cat("共", nrow(vote_export), "条投票记录\n")

共 255 条投票记录

title: Issue #1 - 学生加入申请数据分析
Issue #1 - 学生加入申请数据分析
Issue #1 - 学生加入申请数据分析
text:
数据解析

# 解析评论数据
parse_student_data <- function(body) {
  # 提取学号 - 匹配各种格式
  student_id <- NA
  
  # 格式1: 学号：2025303110116
  if (str_detect(body, "学号[：:][\\s]*(\\d{10,13})")) {
    student_id <- str_extract(body, "学号[：:][\\s]*(\\d{10,13})") %>%
      str_extract("\\d{10,13}")
  }
  # 格式2: 2025303110116
  else if (str_detect(body, "^(\\d{10,13})")) {
    student_id <- str_extract(body, "^(\\d{10,13})")
  }
  
  # 提取姓名
  name <- NA
  if (str_detect(body, "姓名[：:][\\s]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,4})")) {
    name <- str_extract(body, "姓名[：:][\\s]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,4})") %>%
      str_replace("姓名[：:][\\s]*", "")
  }
  
  # 提取感兴趣方向
  interest <- NA
  if (str_detect(body, "感兴趣[的方向方向]*[：:][\\s]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z0-9]+)")) {
    interest <- str_extract(body, "感兴趣[的方向方向]*[：:][\\s]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z0-9]+)") %>%
      str_replace("感兴趣[的方向方向]*[：:][\\s]*", "")
  }
  
  data.frame(
    student_id = student_id,
    name = name,
    interest = interest,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# 解析所有评论
student_data <- lapply(all_comments, function(x) {
  parse_student_data(x$body)
}) %>% bind_rows()

# 数据清洗
student_data <- student_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(student_id)) %>%
  mutate(
    student_id = str_trim(student_id),
    # 验证学号格式：必须以2025开头，13位数字
    valid_id = str_detect(student_id, "^2025\\d{9}$")
  )

cat("解析后有效记录:", nrow(student_data), "条\n")

解析后有效记录: 268 条

cat("学号格式验证通过(2025开头13位):", sum(student_data$valid_id), "条\n")

学号格式验证通过(2025开头13位): 265 条

title: Issue #1 - 学生加入申请数据分析
text:
保存为CSV

# 准备导出数据 - 只包含有效学号
export_data <- student_data %>%
  filter(valid_id) %>%
  mutate(
    姓名 = name,
    感兴趣方向 = ifelse(is.na(interest) | interest == "无", NA, interest)
  ) %>%
  select(
    学号 = student_id,
    姓名,
    感兴趣方向
  )

# 保存CSV
write.csv(export_data, "issue1_students.csv", row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
cat("数据已保存到: issue1_students.csv\n")

数据已保存到: issue1_students.csv

cat("共", nrow(export_data), "条有效记录\n")

共 265 条有效记录

title: Issue #1 - 学生加入申请数据分析
text:
数据可视化

1. 感兴趣方向分布

# 清洗感兴趣方向数据
interest_clean <- student_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(interest), interest != "无", interest != "NA") %>%
  mutate(interest = str_trim(interest))

# 统计方向频次
interest_count <- interest_clean %>%
  count(interest, sort = TRUE) %>%
  head(20)

# 可视化
ggplot(interest_count, aes(x = reorder(interest, n), y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "学生感兴趣方向分布 (Top 20)", x = "方向", y = "人数") +
  theme_minimal()










2. 学号统计

# 学号前缀分析
student_data_prefix <- student_data %>%
  filter(valid_id) %>%
  mutate(prefix = substr(student_id, 1, 4))

prefix_count <- student_data_prefix %>%
  count(prefix, sort = TRUE)

ggplot(head(prefix_count, 10), aes(x = reorder(prefix, n), y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "coral") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "学号年份/专业分布", x = "学号前缀", y = "人数") +
  theme_minimal()










3. 数据质量报告

解析成功: 268 


有效学号: 265 


有姓名: 265
